_comment: Macro binary-event dates (IB13) — the event-risk gate suppresses ALL signals on these dates. RBI MPC announcement days per the RBI FY2026-27 MPC calendar (announcement ~10:00 IST on the final meeting day); Union Budget day. Refresh when RBI publishes the next FY calendar and after each Budget announcement.
_source: RBI MPC meeting calendar FY2026-27; Union Budget 2027-02-01
